hero.description:
Simple manual spending tracker.
Best budget tracker without bank linking.
Assign money and never go over budget.

features.title: Everything you need to manage your finances
features.envelope_desc: Split your money into visual categories. Knowing how much is left in each envelope is as easy as looking.
features.stats_desc: Daily spending charts, by category and by day of the week. Understand your habits at a glance.
features.cap_desc: Set a daily spending limit and get alerts before you go over.
features.recurring_desc: Log your fixed expenses once and forget about it. They'll be deducted automatically each period.
features.sync_desc: Your data is always safe and accessible. Switch devices without losing anything.
features.themes_desc: Customize the app with 9 unique themes, from minimalist to animated.

pro.title: qyp Pro
pro.subtitle: Unlock the full potential of qyp
